title: zosterophyllanthos peroniocephalus
side_effects: Zosterophyllanthos peroniocephalus can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing skin irritation, allergic reactions, and gastrointestinal issues in some individuals. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant may lead to liver damage, seizures, and even coma. The improper use of this plant may also interact with other medications, such as blood thinners and diabetes medications, resulting in adverse health consequences. It is essential to consult a medical professional or a qualified herbalist before using Zosterophyllanthos peroniocephalus for medicinal purposes.
